response.step_by_step_log: Identified songs based on on-screen text and audio. "BANG!!!" by EGOIST, "Rolling Girl" by wowaka, and "Betelgeuse" by Yuuri. Used simple search queries like "[Song Title] [Artist] lyrics" to obtain both Japanese and English lyrics for all songs. The video structure was mapped based on song segments and transitions.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Otonose Kanade, with an appearance by Kobo Kanaeru for the first song. It consists of three songs: "BANG!!!" (originally by EGOIST), "Rolling Girl" (originally by wowaka), and "Betelgeuse" (originally by Yuuri). Transitions occur between performances.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade and Kobo Kanaeru performing "BANG!!!". Text "BANG!!!" appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Everybody say I want to be free)
Yesも Noも言わない それじゃ何も変えられない
(Everybody say I want to live more)
叶えたい自分 肯定 生きてるんだ
あたし ねえ 生きてるんだ
あたし 歌えや歌え 今を (声上げて)
生まれたその時から選んできたんだ 思い出せ あたしはあたしだ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Everybody say I want to be free)
I don't say yes or no, I can't change anything with that
(Everybody say I want to live more)
I affirm the self I want to fulfill, I'm alive
Hey, I'm alive, I sing, I sing now (raise your voice)
I've chosen it since I was born, remember, I am me

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performing "Rolling Girl". Text "ローリンガール" and "wowaka" appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ロンリーガールはいつまでも 届かない夢見て
騒ぐ頭の中を掻き回して、掻き回して。
ローリンガールの成れの果て
届かない、向こうの色
重なる声と声を混ぜあわせて、混ぜあわせて。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The lonely girl is dreaming forever, seeing dreams that won't reach
Screaming inside her head, stirring it up, stirring it up
The aftermath of a rolling girl, the colors beyond that won't reach
Mixing voices that overlap with voices, mixing them up, mixing them up

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performing "Betelgeuse". Text "ベテルギウス" and "優里" appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
空にある何かを見つめてたら
それは星だって君がおしえてくれた
まるでそれは僕らみたいに 寄り添ってる
それを泣いたり笑ったり繋いでいく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
As I stared at something in the sky
You told me they were stars
It's as if they're nestling close just like us
Connecting it, crying, laughing
